description.ko: 음파가 복잡한 기하학적 구조로 고체화되는 과정을 시각화함.
description.en: A visualization of sound waves solidifying into complex geometric structures.

prompt: A cinematic 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Resonance Lattice.' A central vibrating geometric core generating complex #4169E1 royal blue frequency waves and #FF4500 electric orange ripples that solidify into floating crystalline lattices. The surrounding void is filled with #32CD32 green kinetic particles and #FFD700 gold light trails reacting to audio frequencies. Ray-traced, 8k resolution.
